The '''Habeen''' were one of two [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that were native to the [[Mylok system/Legends|Mylok system]]. Along with the other species that shared their [[Star system/Legends|star system]], the [[Nharwaak]], the Habeen jointly designed and produced a new form of [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] technology.

Approximately [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the Habeen and Nharwaak entered into a civil war over control of this technology. Soon after the conflict erupted, the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]] was dispatched to the Mylok system in order to end the war and gain the new technology for use in his advanced new [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]], the [[TIE/ad starfighter]] and [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]]. The Habeen appealed to the Empire for assistance in exchange for the technology. Zaarin agreed, and along with ace pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], decisively routed the combined forces of the Nharwaak and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
